red_light.risk: High-impact collision — leading cause of urban intersection fatalities
red_light.msg: Red light violation detected. Vehicle/motorcycle crossed active red signal.

no_helmet.risk: Head injury risk increased by 70%. Helmets reduce fatality risk by 42%.
no_helmet.msg: Bare head detected on motorcyclist. Helmet mandatory under Section 129 MVA.

no_seatbelt.risk: Fatal injury risk increased by 45% in front-impact collisions.
no_seatbelt.msg: Seatbelt not detected. Seatbelt mandatory under Section 194B MVA.

overspeeding_school.risk: School Zone: 25 km/h limit strictly enforced. Child pedestrian collision risk.
overspeeding_school.msg: Speed limit exceeded in protected school zone. Reduce to 25 km/h immediately.

wrong_side.risk: Head-on collision risk — one of the top 3 causes of highway fatalities in India.
wrong_side.msg: Vehicle detected moving against traffic flow. Immediate correction required.

traffic_blocking.risk: Gridlock endangers emergency vehicle access. Cascade effect causes city-wide delays.
traffic_blocking.msg: Dense vehicle cluster detected. Possible intentional traffic obstruction under IPC 283.

pedestrian_road.law: Motor Vehicles Act, Section 283 / State Traffic Rules
pedestrian_road.risk: Pedestrian in active lane — high collision risk for both pedestrian and drivers.
pedestrian_road.msg: Pedestrian detected in active traffic lane. Hazardous situation flagged immediately.

helmet_ok.msg: Helmet detected and confirmed. Rider complying with Section 129 MVA.

safe.msg: All compliance checks passing. Continue safe driving.
